overview.description: Retail and e-commerce in Vietnam is one of the fastest-growing sectors in Southeast Asia, fueled by high smartphone penetration, rising middle class, and platforms like Shopee, Lazada, and Tiki. AI adoption spans demand forecasting, personalization, chatbot customer service, fraud detection, and dynamic pricing.

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: High — millions of transactions per day for large platforms
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Medium to high — structured e-commerce data, but offline retail data is messier

painPoints.problem: Inaccurate demand forecasting leads to overstock and stockouts
Customer service overwhelmed by repetitive queries
Fraudulent transactions and return abuse increasing with scale

relatedNodes.description: Retail depends on logistics for fulfillment and last-mile delivery.
Demand forecasting is the highest-impact AI use case for retail.
